fields.title: Investigate tau skill registration and marker skill plugin behavior
fields.description: User reports tau skills may not appear in listed skills, but marker skill plugin '$' can still invoke a tau skill. Investigate runtime skill discovery/registration and explain how marker invocation differs from listing.
fields.close_reason: Investigated skill registration paths. Tau extension skills are registered for the core skill list via resources_discover, while the $ skill-marker uses loadSkills defaults only and does not read extension-discovered skill paths. Explained mismatch and likely causes to user.
